description: mu-Tant headless render smoke. mu-Tant is a wavetable synth: at default the transport is stopped, which holds the gate fully open, so the oscillators drone — guaranteed non-silent audio with NO preset and NO sample dependency. Used by mac-validate.yml to prove the Mac build actually produces sound, host- and content-independently. Rendered via `mu-Tant --render --out <wav> --seconds 4`.

assertions.name: drone_is_audible
assertions.comment: the default oscillator drone must sit clearly above the noise floor across the render — a silent clip means the Mac build isn't producing audio
